signals.headline: Cooper Flagg ruled out of Mavericks' season finale with left ankle sprain | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg ruled out of Mavericks' season finale with left ankle sprain | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The Dallas Mavericks officially announced that rookie Cooper Flagg (left ankle sprain) will not return after exiting early in the second quarter of their final 2025-26 regular season game against the Chicago Bulls on Sunday, capping his standout rookie year (21 PPG, 6.7 RPG, 4.5 APG over 70 games)
